Title: Delete Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an event created.
Test Data: - event title: New Event
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the city view screen.
2. Scroll down and find the event titled "New Event".
3. Click on the "-" button to delete the event.
4. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: The event should be deleted successfully, and the event list should no longer display the deleted event.

Title: Modify Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and has an event created.
Test Data:
- event title: New Event
- new data: 2023-10-11
- new tipologia: Festival
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the city view screen.
2. Scroll down and find the event titled "New Event".
3. Click on the "penna" (pen) icon to edit the event.
4. Modify the event data as provided.
5. Validate the fields.
6. Submit the form.
Expected Result: The event should be modified successfully, and the updated event details should be displayed on the city view screen.
